mapper.sql: select notice_id, notice_title, notice_type, cast(notice_content as char) as notice_content, status, biz_category, notice_summary, receiver_scope, receiver_user_ids, action_type, action_path, action_target_id, pinned, publish_time, expire_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_notice
mapper.insert: insert into sys_notice ( notice_title, notice_type, notice_content, status, biz_category, notice_summary, receiver_scope, receiver_user_ids, action_type, action_path, action_target_id, pinned, publish_time, expire_time, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeType}, #{noticeContent}, #{status}, #{bizCategory}, #{noticeSummary}, #{receiverScope}, #{receiverUserIds}, #{actionType}, #{actionPath}, #{actionTargetId}, #{pinned}, #{publishTime}, #{expireTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_notice where notice_id in
#{noticeId}
